name: zymtrace mcp tool-selection matrix
description: Compare stock and tuned descriptions for the Zymtrace MCP profiling-analysis tools.

instruction_variants.instructions: Choose the single Zymtrace MCP tool that should be called next. Use get_date_time before generated REST-style tools when the user gives relative time and the schema wants Unix milliseconds. Use projects_search before project_id tools when the project id is unknown. Prefer high-level tools for common profiling questions: topfunctions for hot functions, topentities for hot executables/scripts/hosts/threads/containers/pods, hot_traces for stack-trace discovery, flamegraph for a rendered flamegraph, and recommendations for already-generated optimization advice. Use project_metrics_activity_aggr before project_metrics_query. Use raw project event/stat endpoints only when the user has a project id and asks for low-level aggregate/raw event payloads.
instruction_variants.name: zymtrace_host_rules

tools.name: flamegraph
tools.purpose: Return profiling data as flamegraph.

tools.name: get_date_time
tools.purpose: Get the current local date/time and machine-usable Unix milliseconds.

tools.name: hot_traces
tools.purpose: Find hot CPU/GPU profiling stack traces.

tools.name: project_events_raw
tools.purpose: Fetch raw events.

tools.name: project_flamegraph_json
tools.purpose: Generate a JSON-format flamegraph.

tools.name: project_metrics_activity_aggr
tools.purpose: Retrieve metrics activity aggregations for a project.

tools.name: project_metrics_query
tools.purpose: Query metrics for a project with custom filters.

tools.name: projects_events_aggregate
tools.purpose: Aggregate project events.

tools.name: projects_events_aggregate_host_metadata
tools.purpose: Aggregate host metadata.

tools.name: projects_events_aggregate_top_field_values
tools.purpose: Return the most common values for common filter fields.

tools.name: projects_search
tools.purpose: Search projects.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_architectures
tools.purpose: Return top architectures.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_clusters
tools.purpose: Return top clusters.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_containers
tools.purpose: Return top containers.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_deployments
tools.purpose: Return top deployments.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_hosts
tools.purpose: Return top hosts.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_main_exes
tools.purpose: Return top main executables.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_namespaces
tools.purpose: Return top namespaces.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_pods
tools.purpose: Return top pods.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_script_names
tools.purpose: Return top script names.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_thread_names
tools.purpose: Return top thread names.

tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_user_tags
tools.purpose: Return top user tags.

tools.name: recommendations
tools.purpose: Return recommendations already generated for a project's hot traces.

properties.entity: executable, script, host, thread, deployment, container, namespace, or pod

tools.name: topentities
tools.purpose: Return list of GPU, CPU or allocation top entities.

tools.name: topfunctions
tools.purpose: Return list of GPU, CPU or allocation top functions.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user asks for ranked functions, entities, generated recommendations, or raw event aggregates.
tools.name: flamegraph
tools.purpose: Return a high-level rendered flamegraph for a time window and optional runtime filters.
quality_checks: Use CPU unless the user asks for GPU or allocation data.
Include a bounded time window.
Apply named entity filters instead of fetching unfiltered data.
tools.use_when: Use when the user explicitly asks for a flamegraph or visual hot-path tree and does not require a project-specific REST JSON payload.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user already supplied absolute RFC3339 timestamps or Unix millisecond timestamps.
tools.name: get_date_time
tools.purpose: Get current local time and Unix milliseconds for relative Zymtrace time-window requests.
quality_checks: Use before REST-style project tools that require start_ts/end_ts in Unix milliseconds.
Do not hand-convert relative dates when this tool is available.
tools.use_when: Use when the user says now, last hour, today, yesterday, recent, or another relative time range.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid as a first full-stack fetch. Use meta_only=true and a small limit before requesting a selected prefix_hash.
tools.name: hot_traces
tools.purpose: Discover the hottest stack traces and drill into one selected trace.
quality_checks: First call uses meta_only=true unless the user explicitly asks for full stacks.
Default limit is 5 or lower.
Use filter_text or structured filters when the user names an entity.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks what trace, stack, or call path is hot, or asks to drill into a specific hot trace.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for ordinary top functions, top entities, metrics, recommendations, or summaries. Prefer higher-level tools first.

properties.request_body: Raw event filter with start_ts/end_ts and approx_limit

tools.name: project_events_raw
tools.purpose: Fetch raw profiling events for one known project id.
quality_checks: Use only when project_id is known.
Keep approx_limit small.
Use get_date_time first for relative time ranges.
tools.use_when: Use when the user explicitly asks for raw events or event samples.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user did not provide or discover a project id; use flamegraph for high-level flamegraph requests.
tools.name: project_flamegraph_json
tools.purpose: Generate project-specific JSON flamegraph data for downstream processing.
quality_checks: Use only with a known project_id.
Use when JSON is needed, not just a rendered flamegraph.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks for JSON flamegraph data from a known project.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the metric name is already known and the user asks for values; use project_metrics_query then.
tools.name: project_metrics_activity_aggr
tools.purpose: Discover active metric names and useful attributes for a known project.
quality_checks: Use before metric value queries.
Return candidate metric names and dimensions.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks what metrics exist, which model/service/token metrics are active, or which metric attributes are available.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid before discovering metric names when the user is unsure what metrics exist.
tools.name: project_metrics_query
tools.purpose: Query metric time-series values for known metric names and dimensions.
quality_checks: Use project_metrics_activity_aggr first when metric names are unknown.
Include every relevant discovered metric instead of picking one representative metric.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks for metric values, latency series, token metrics, gauges, counters, or histograms for a known project.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for top dimensions that have a dedicated stats endpoint or for raw event samples.
tools.name: projects_events_aggregate
tools.purpose: Aggregate profiling events for one known project id.
quality_checks: Use only when project_id is known.
Use time filters and event kind filters.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks for event aggregate counts or grouped event summaries.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for generic top hosts; use projects_stats_aggregate_top_hosts for host ranking.
tools.name: projects_events_aggregate_host_metadata
tools.purpose: Aggregate host metadata for a known project.
quality_checks: Use only when host metadata is requested.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks for host architecture, GPU, OS, or other host metadata aggregation.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user names one specific dimension with a dedicated top endpoint.
tools.name: projects_events_aggregate_top_field_values
tools.purpose: Find common values across multiple common Zymtrace filter fields.
quality_checks: Use only with a known project_id.
Prefer dedicated top endpoints for one exact dimension.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which filters or field values are available or common.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the project_id is already known.
tools.name: projects_search
tools.purpose: Find Zymtrace projects before calling project_id-scoped tools.
quality_checks: Search before project-specific tools when only a project name is known.
tools.use_when: Use when the user names a project but does not provide its UUID, or asks what projects are available.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for runtime hot paths; use topfunctions, topentities, or hot_traces.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_architectures
tools.purpose: Rank host CPU architectures for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which architectures are present or hottest.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for pod, namespace, deployment, host, or container-specific ranking.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_clusters
tools.purpose: Rank clusters for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which clusters are contributing most.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for pod, namespace, deployment, host, or executable ranking.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_containers
tools.purpose: Rank containers for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which containers are hottest or most active.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for pod, namespace, container, host, or executable ranking.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_deployments
tools.purpose: Rank deployments for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which deployments are hottest or most active.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for host metadata details; use projects_events_aggregate_host_metadata then.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_hosts
tools.purpose: Rank hosts for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which hosts are hottest or most active.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for script, thread, container, pod, or function ranking.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_main_exes
tools.purpose: Rank main executables for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which executables or processes are hottest.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for pod, deployment, container, host, or executable ranking.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_namespaces
tools.purpose: Rank Kubernetes namespaces for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which namespaces are hottest or most active.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for namespace, deployment, container, host, or executable ranking.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_pods
tools.purpose: Rank Kubernetes pods for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which pods are hottest or most active.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for executable or function ranking.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_script_names
tools.purpose: Rank script names for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which scripts are hottest or most active.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for function ranking; use topfunctions for function names.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_thread_names
tools.purpose: Rank thread names for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which threads are hottest or most active.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for built-in dimensions such as host, pod, container, executable, or script.
tools.name: projects_stats_aggregate_top_user_tags
tools.purpose: Rank custom user tags for a known project.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which custom tags are hottest or most active.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user asks for raw stack evidence first; use hot_traces or topfunctions to inspect evidence.
tools.name: recommendations
tools.purpose: Return already-generated actionable optimization recommendations for hot traces.
quality_checks: Use after or alongside hot-trace discovery when the user asks what to change.
Page only when more recommendations are needed.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks for optimization recommendations, suggested fixes, or already-generated advice.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user asks for function names, stack traces, or flamegraphs.

properties.entity: executable, script, host, thread, deployment, container, namespace, or pod

tools.name: topentities
tools.purpose: Rank top runtime entities such as executables, scripts, hosts, threads, deployments, containers, namespaces, or pods.
quality_checks: Set entity to the dimension the user named.
Use CPU unless the user asks for GPU or allocation data.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which host, container, pod, namespace, executable, script, deployment, or thread is hottest.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user asks for hosts, containers, pods, scripts, raw traces, or a flamegraph.
tools.name: topfunctions
tools.purpose: Rank hottest functions for CPU, GPU, or allocation profiles.
quality_checks: Use CPU unless the user asks for GPU or allocation data.
Apply entity filters when the user names a host, container, pod, executable, or script.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks which functions, methods, frames, or symbols are hottest.

cases.name: relative time needs date helper
cases.task: For the last 30 minutes of Zymtrace data, prepare the time range I should use for generated project metrics API calls.

cases.name: unknown project id uses search
cases.task: Find the Zymtrace project named llama-inference before we inspect its metrics.

cases.name: cpu hot functions
cases.task: Show the hottest CPU functions from 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 to 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

cases.name: hot containers use entities
cases.task: Which containers consumed the most CPU between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00?

cases.name: first trace discovery is meta only
cases.task: Find the hottest stack traces for python workers in the last hour, but do not dump full stacks yet.

cases.name: high level flamegraph
cases.task: Give me a CPU flamegraph for the vllm executable from 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 to 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

cases.name: discover metrics before query
cases.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, what metric names and attributes are active?

cases.name: known metric query
cases.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, query the known request_latency histogram for service api over this time window.

cases.name: generated optimization advice
cases.task: Show already-generated Zymtrace optimization recommendations for CPU traces from 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 to 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

cases.name: raw events are explicit
cases.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, fetch a small raw event sample for debugging the event payload shape.

cases.name: discover common filter fields
cases.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, show the most common available filter field values across profiling events.

cases.name: project top pods endpoint
cases.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank the hottest Kubernetes pods.
